Class TextBasedLogicalPlanPrinterImpl.MyPropertiesExtractor

java.lang.Object
se.liu.ida.hefquin.engine.queryplan.utils.TextBasedLogicalPlanPrinterImpl.MyPropertiesExtractor
All Implemented Interfaces:
LogicalPlanVisitor
Direct Known Subclasses:
TextBasedPhysicalPlanPrinterImpl.MyPropertiesExtractor
Enclosing class:
TextBasedLogicalPlanPrinterImpl
public static class TextBasedLogicalPlanPrinterImpl.MyPropertiesExtractor extends Object implements LogicalPlanVisitor

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    fullStringForGraphPattern
    A full-string representation of the graph pattern of the most recently visited operator (if any), but only if that string is too long to be put as a property into props (in which case we put a shortened version of that string into props).
    SPARQLGraphPattern
    graphPattern
    The graph pattern of the most recently visited operator (if any).
    List<String>
    props
    Strings representing the properties of the most recently visited operator.

    • props

      public List<String> props
      Strings representing the properties of the most recently visited operator.

    • graphPattern

      public SPARQLGraphPattern graphPattern
      The graph pattern of the most recently visited operator (if any).

    • fullStringForGraphPattern

      public String fullStringForGraphPattern
      A full-string representation of the graph pattern of the most recently visited operator (if any), but only if that string is too long to be put as a property into props (in which case we put a shortened version of that string into props).
